name: epwforge-mcp
summary: MCP server for EPWForge — let Claude and other AI agents generate climate-stressed weather files (EPW, DDY) for any global location. Custom TMYx / AMY synthesis from ERA5, CMIP6 future-climate morphing (10 horizons 2030-2100, 3 SSPs, 7 percentiles, 30+ models), urban heat island presets, extreme-event injection (heat waves, cold snaps, humidity & wind compound events with per-event intensity), and wildfire smoke overlays. For EnergyPlus, OpenStudio, IES VE, eQUEST and any EPW workflow.
